# Anima Volitiva — Managed B2B Coffee Infrastructure (Kyiv & Kyiv Oblast)

_Last updated: 2026-07-23 — lead-capture form live on every page; bilingual EN/UA._

> Anima Volitiva provides fully-managed, flat-rate B2B coffee infrastructure for HoReCa, retail and corporate offices across Kyiv and Kyiv Oblast: Swiss-grade Franke and WMF super-automatic machines, origin-traced specialty beans, mandatory 2-hour barista training and 24/7 technical support with a guaranteed 2-hour emergency response — one flat monthly invoice, zero upfront CapEx.

> Languages: the site is bilingual. Ukrainian is the primary language for the native Kyiv market (served under /ua/), with English available at the root for wider reach. Every page has both a Ukrainian and an English version, cross-linked via hreflang (uk / en / x-default→uk).

## Key facts
- Service area: Kyiv and Kyiv Oblast (50 km radius)
- Model: zero upfront CapEx; flat monthly invoice ($1,997/mo Growth Bundle; Enterprise from $10,000+)
- Guaranteed 2-hour emergency response, 24/7, no call-out fees
- Equipment: Franke, WMF, Nuova Simonelli, La Spaziale, Rancilio
- Water: filtration calibrated to Kyiv's 124 mg/L hardness; voltage protection for blackouts
- No forced bean quotas; origin-traced specialty-grade beans
- Proven: 100% SLA compliance (2026), 3x retail coffee revenue, 40% fewer workplace complaints in 30 days

## Pages
- [Home](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/): overview, offer, proof, comparison
- [Services](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/services.html): all six services
- [Machine rental](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/how-to-rent.html): zero-CapEx OpEx rental
- [Monthly service contract](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/monthly-contract.html): what's included
- [Specialty bean supply](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/specialty-beans.html): origin-traced beans
- [Barista staff training](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/barista-training.html): mandatory 2-hour program
- [Maintenance & 24/7 support](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/maintenance.html): 2-hour SLA
- [Swiss vs. commercial machines](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/swiss-vs-commercial.html): why Swiss-grade

## Сторінки (Ukrainian / основна мова)
- [Головна](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/): огляд, пропозиція, докази, порівняння
- [Послуги](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/services.html): усі шість послуг
- [Оренда машини](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/how-to-rent.html): оренда без капвитрат (OpEx)
- [Щомісячний сервісний контракт](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/monthly-contract.html): що входить
- [Постачання спешелті-зерна](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/specialty-beans.html): зерно з простеженим походженням
- [Навчання персоналу-бариста](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/barista-training.html): обов'язкова 2-годинна програма
- [Обслуговування та підтримка 24/7](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/maintenance.html): SLA за 2 години
- [Швейцарські vs комерційні машини](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/ua/swiss-vs-commercial.html): чому швейцарський клас
- [Answers / Q&A](https://dancanadian.github.io/anima-coffee-site/answers.html): 13 question-targeted answers (rental, contract, beans, training, maintenance, machines) — Ukrainian at /ua/answers.html
